en: Now Joseph had been brought down to Egypt, and Potiphar, an officer of Pharaoh, the captain of the guard, an Egyptian, had bought him from the Ishmaelites who had brought him down there.
zh: 約瑟被帶下埃及去了。有一個埃及人，是法老的臣宰，軍長波提乏，從那些帶約瑟下來的以實瑪利人手裡買了他。

en: The LORD was with Joseph, and he became a successful man, and he was in the house of his Egyptian master.
zh: 耶和華與約瑟同在，約瑟就事事順利，住在他主人埃及人的家裡。

en: His master saw that the LORD was with him and that the LORD caused all that he did to succeed in his hands.
zh: 他的主人見耶和華與他同在，又見耶和華使他手裡所作的盡都順利，

en: So Joseph found favor in his sight and attended him, and he made him overseer of his house and put him in charge of all that he had.
zh: 約瑟就得主人的歡心，服事他的主人。他主人指派他管理他的家，把自己所有的一切都交在他手裡。

en: From the time that he made him overseer in his house and over all that he had the LORD blessed the Egyptian's house for Joseph's sake; the blessing of the LORD was on all that he had, in house and field.
zh: 自從主人指派約瑟管理他的家，和他所有的一切，耶和華就因約瑟的緣故，賜福給那埃及人的家。他家裡和田間所有的一切，都蒙耶和華賜福。

en: So he left all that he had in Joseph's charge, and because of him he had no concern about anything but the food he ate. Now Joseph was handsome in form and appearance.
zh: 波提乏把自己所有的一切，都交在約瑟的手裡。除了自己所吃的飯以外，其他的事他一概不管。約瑟生來體格壯健，容貌俊美。

en: And after a time his master's wife cast her eyes on Joseph and said, "Lie with me."
zh: 這些事以後，約瑟主人的妻子以目傳情給約瑟，說：“與我同睡吧。”

en: But he refused and said to his master's wife, "Behold, because of me my master has no concern about anything in the house, and he has put everything that he has in my charge.
zh: 約瑟不肯，對他主人的妻子說：“你看，家中的事我主人一概不管；他把他所有的一切，都交在我的手裡。

en: He is not greater in this house than I am, nor has he kept back anything from me except yourself, because you are his wife. How then can I do this great wickedness and sin against God?"
zh: 在這家裡沒有比我大的。除你以外，我主人沒有留下一樣不交給我，因為你是他的妻子。我怎可以作這極惡的事，得罪 神呢？”

en: And as she spoke to Joseph day after day, he would not listen to her, to lie beside her or to be with her.
zh: 她雖然天天對約瑟這樣說，約瑟卻不聽從她，不肯與她同睡，也不與她在一起。

en: But one day, when he went into the house to do his work and none of the men of the house was there in the house,
zh: 有一天，約瑟到屋裡辦事，家裡的人沒有一個在屋裡。

en: she caught him by his garment, saying, "Lie with me." But he left his garment in her hand and fled and got out of the house.
zh: 婦人就抓住約瑟的衣服，說：“與我同睡吧。”約瑟把自己的衣服留在婦人的手裡，跑到外面去了。

en: And as soon as she saw that he had left his garment in her hand and had fled out of the house,
zh: 婦人見約瑟把衣服留在她手裡，跑到外面去，

en: she called to the men of her household and said to them, "See, he has brought among us a Hebrew to laugh at us. He came in to me to lie with me, and I cried out with a loud voice.
zh: 就把家裡的人都叫了來，對他們說：“你們看，我丈夫帶回家來的希伯來人想調戲我們。他進到我這裡來，要與我同睡，我就大聲呼叫。

en: And as soon as he heard that I lifted up my voice and cried out, he left his garment beside me and fled and got out of the house."
zh: 他一聽見我高聲呼叫，就把衣服留在我身邊，跑到外面去了。”

en: Then she laid up his garment by her until his master came home,
zh: 婦人把約瑟的衣服放在她身邊，等她的主人回家。

en: and she told him the same story, saying, "The Hebrew servant, whom you have brought among us, came in to me to laugh at me.
zh: 她又用同樣的話對他說：“你帶回家來的希伯來奴隸，竟進到這裡來，要調戲我。

en: But as soon as I lifted up my voice and cried, he left his garment beside me and fled out of the house."
zh: 我高聲呼叫，他就把衣服留在我身邊，跑到外面去了。”

en: As soon as his master heard the words that his wife spoke to him, "This is the way your servant treated me," his anger was kindled.
zh: 約瑟的主人聽了他妻子對他所說的話，說：“你的僕人就是這樣對待我。”他就非常生氣。

en: And Joseph's master took him and put him into the prison, the place where the king's prisoners were confined, and he was there in prison.
zh: 於是，約瑟的主人拿住約瑟，把他關在監裡，就是王的囚犯被監禁的地方；約瑟就在那裡坐監。

en: But the LORD was with Joseph and showed him steadfast love and gave him favor in the sight of the keeper of the prison.
zh: 但是，耶和華與約瑟同在，向他施慈愛，使他得到監獄長的歡心。

en: And the keeper of the prison put Joseph in charge of all the prisoners who were in the prison. Whatever was done there, he was the one who did it.
zh: 因此，監獄長把監裡所有的囚犯都交在約瑟手裡；他們在那裡所作的一切事務，都由約瑟負責處理。

en: The keeper of the prison paid no attention to anything that was in Joseph's charge, because the LORD was with him. And whatever he did, the LORD made it succeed.
zh: 凡交在約瑟手裡的事務，監獄長一概不聞不問；因為耶和華與約瑟同在，使他所作的盡都順利。
